templates.title: Code Generator
templates.description: Generate clean, well-documented code in a specific language for a given task.

variables.name: task_description
variables.defaultValue: processes a list of user data and returns aggregated statistics

variables.name: requirement_2
variables.defaultValue: Support both small and large datasets efficiently

examples:
Write a Python function called process_data that processes a list of user data and returns aggregated statistics. Requirements:
1. Handle empty input gracefully
2. Support both small and large datasets efficiently
3. Include type hints and docstrings

Please include:
- Clear comments explaining the logic
- Error handling where appropriate
- Example usage
- Time and space complexity analysis

templates.title: Code Review Assistant
templates.description: Review code for bugs, performance issues, and best practices.
templates.content:
Review the following {{language}} code for:
1. Bugs and logical errors
2. Performance issues
3. Security vulnerabilities
4. Code style and best practices
5. Potential improvements

Code to review:
```
{{code}}
```

Please provide:
- Detailed analysis of each issue found
- Severity level (critical/high/medium/low)
- Specific suggestions for improvement
- Refactored code example if applicable

variables.name: code
